live.title: Wheel Of Fortune
live.shortDescription: Recognised by Guinness World Records as the world’s most popular TV game show, Wheel of Fortune arrives in India in spectacular fashion, hosted by Akshay Kumar. Contestants enter a thrilling word game, decoding phrases spanning Bollywood, pop culture and everyday life. Blending entertainment with edge-of-the-seat moments, every alphabet can change the game as players compete for paisa and prizes.
live.longDescription: Recognised by Guinness World Records as the world’s most popular TV game show, Wheel of Fortune arrives in India in spectacular fashion, hosted by Akshay Kumar. Contestants enter a thrilling word game, decoding phrases spanning Bollywood, pop culture and everyday life. Blending entertainment with edge-of-the-seat moments, every alphabet can change the game as players compete for paisa and prizes.
